_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PANEL
name: Counter-Strike: Global Offensive
author: admin@example.com
description: Counter-Strike: Global Offensive (App 4465480) dedicated server — original Source engine build, SourceMod/MetaMod compatible. Supports Casual, Competitive, Arms Race, Demolition, Deathmatch, and custom game modes. Includes 32-bit libs needed for SourceMod database (MySQL/MariaDB) plugins.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# CS:GO Dedicated Server — Pelican Panel Install Script
# App ID: 740 (CS:GO dedicated server — Source engine, SourceMod compatible)

echo "========== CSGOEGG INSTALL SCRIPT v2 =========="

cd /mnt/server

apt-get update -y
apt-get install -y lib32gcc-s1 lib32stdc++6 lib32z1 curl ca-certificates

## ── Fix permissions for SteamCMD ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# SteamCMD's 'Missing file permissions' error is caused by:
#   1. Missing steamapps directory in the install dir
#   2. Restrictive permissions on the mount point
# Fix all of these before running SteamCMD.
echo "Fixing permissions..."
export HOME=/mnt/server
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamapps
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
chmod -R 777 /mnt/server

## ── SteamCMD ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
echo "Downloading SteamCMD..."
curl -sqL "https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz" | tar zxvf - -C /mnt/server/steamcmd

## ── CS:GO dedicated server ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
echo "Installing CS:GO dedicated server (App 740)..."
/mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh \
    +force_install_dir /mnt/server \
    +login anonymous \
    +app_update 740 validate \
    +quit

if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then
    echo "SteamCMD failed. Retrying once..."
    /mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh \
        +force_install_dir /mnt/server \
        +login anonymous \
        +app_update 740 validate \
        +quit
fi

## ── Patch steam.inf App ID (740 → 4465480) ────────────────────────────────────
# Server files are downloaded via App 740, but players connect using App 4465480.
# Patch steam.inf so the server advertises the correct App ID.
echo "Patching steam.inf App ID to 4465480..."
if [ -f /mnt/server/csgo/steam.inf ]; then
    sed -i 's/appID=.*/appID=4465480/' /mnt/server/csgo/steam.inf
    echo "steam.inf patched successfully."
else
    echo "WARNING: csgo/steam.inf not found, cannot patch App ID."
fi

## ── MetaMod:Source (stable) ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
if [ ! -d /mnt/server/csgo/addons/metamod ]; then
    echo "Installing MetaMod:Source (stable)..."
    MM_URL=$(curl -sL "https://www.sourcemm.net/downloads.php?branch=stable" \
        | grep -oP 'https://mms\.alliedmods\.net/[^"]+linux\.tar\.gz' | head -1)
    if [ -z "$MM_URL" ]; then
        echo "ERROR: Could not find MetaMod download URL from stable branch page."
        exit 1
    fi
    curl -sqL "$MM_URL" | tar -xzf - -C /mnt/server/csgo
    echo "MetaMod:Source installed: $MM_URL"
else
    echo "MetaMod:Source already installed, skipping."
fi

## ── Fix MetaMod VDF (force 32-bit for CS:GO) ─────────────────────────────────
echo "Fixing MetaMod VDF for 32-bit CS:GO srcds..."
cat > /mnt/server/csgo/addons/metamod.vdf << 'VDFEOF'
"Plugin"
{
    "file"  "addons/metamod/bin/server"
}
VDFEOF
rm -rf /mnt/server/csgo/addons/metamod/bin/linux64
echo "Removed MetaMod 64-bit binaries (CS:GO is 32-bit)."

## ── Patch srcds_run SDR ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
echo "Patching srcds_run to disable SDR_LISTEN_PORT..."
if [ -f /mnt/server/srcds_run ]; then
    sed -i 's/^\(\s*export SDR_LISTEN_PORT=\)/#\1/' /mnt/server/srcds_run
fi

## ── SourceMod (stable) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
if [ ! -d /mnt/server/csgo/addons/sourcemod ]; then
    echo "Installing SourceMod (stable)..."
    SM_URL=$(curl -sL "https://www.sourcemod.net/downloads.php?branch=stable" \
        | grep -oP 'https://sm\.alliedmods\.net/[^"]+linux\.tar\.gz' | head -1)
    if [ -z "$SM_URL" ]; then
        echo "ERROR: Could not find SourceMod download URL from stable branch page."
        exit 1
    fi
    curl -sqL "$SM_URL" | tar -xzf - -C /mnt/server/csgo
    echo "SourceMod installed: $SM_URL"
else
    echo "SourceMod already installed, skipping."
fi

## ── Required plugins ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
echo "Installing required plugins..."
mkdir -p /mnt/server/csgo/addons/sourcemod/plugins
mkdir -p /mnt/server/csgo/addons/sourcemod/gamedata

REPO_RAW="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Veslydev/csgoegg/main/plugins"

curl -sqL "$REPO_RAW/nolobbyreservation.smx" \
    -o /mnt/server/csgo/addons/sourcemod/plugins/nolobbyreservation.smx
curl -sqL "$REPO_RAW/nolobbyreservation.games.txt" \
    -o /mnt/server/csgo/addons/sourcemod/gamedata/nolobbyreservation.games.txt

echo "Plugins installed."

## ── Default config files ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
mkdir -p /mnt/server/csgo/cfg

if [ ! -f /mnt/server/csgo/cfg/server.cfg ]; then
    echo "Creating default server.cfg..."
    cat > /mnt/server/csgo/cfg/server.cfg << 'CFGEOF'
// CS:GO Server Configuration
hostname "CS:GO Server"
sv_password ""
sv_cheats 0
sv_lan 0
sv_pure 1
sv_allowdownload 1
sv_allowupload 1
sv_minrate 128000
sv_maxrate 0
sv_minupdaterate 128
sv_maxupdaterate 0
CFGEOF
fi

if [ ! -f /mnt/server/csgo/cfg/gamemode_competitive_server.cfg ]; then
    echo "Creating default gamemode_competitive_server.cfg..."
    cat > /mnt/server/csgo/cfg/gamemode_competitive_server.cfg << 'CFGEOF'
// Competitive Server Settings
mp_maxrounds 30
mp_overtime_enable 1
mp_overtime_maxrounds 6
mp_halftime 1
mp_freezetime 15
mp_roundtime 1.92
mp_roundtime_defuse 1.92
mp_buytime 20
mp_startmoney 800
sv_talk_enemy_dead 0
sv_deadtalk 1
mp_autoteambalance 0
mp_limitteams 0
CFGEOF
fi

echo ""
echo "CS:GO + MetaMod + SourceMod installation complete!"

variables.name: Steam Game Server Login Token
variables.description: Your GSLT (Game Server Login Token) from https://steamcommunity.com/dev/managegameservers — create the token using App ID 4465480 (NOT 730 or 740). Required for public VAC-secured servers. Leave empty for LAN/private play.

variables.name: Default Map
variables.description: The map the server loads on startup. Examples: de_dust2, de_mirage, de_inferno, de_nuke, cs_office.

variables.name: Max Players
variables.description: Maximum number of players allowed on the server at one time.

variables.name: Tick Rate
variables.description: Server tick rate. Use 64 for casual/standard play, 128 for competitive/high-performance. Higher tick rate increases CPU usage.

variables.name: Game Type
variables.description: Server game type. 0 = Classic (Casual/Competitive), 1 = Gun Game (Arms Race/Demolition/Deathmatch), 2 = Training, 3 = Custom.

variables.name: Game Mode
variables.description: Server game mode, paired with Game Type. Type 0: 0=Casual, 1=Competitive, 2=Wingman. Type 1: 0=Arms Race, 1=Demolition, 2=Deathmatch. Type 3: 0=Custom.

variables.name: Map Group
variables.description: Map group / rotation for +mapgroup. Examples: mg_active, mg_bomb, mg_hostage, mg_armsrace, mg_demolition, mg_deathmatch. Use mg_active for the active duty pool.

variables.name: Client Port
variables.description: Port used for client-to-server connections. Usually SERVER_PORT + 1.

variables.name: GOTV Port
variables.description: Port used for GOTV (SourceTV) spectator broadcasting. Usually SERVER_PORT + 2.

variables.name: Steam Web API Key
variables.description: Your Steam Web API key from https://steamcommunity.com/dev/apikey — required for workshop map downloads. Leave empty to disable workshop support.

variables.name: Additional Arguments
variables.description: Any extra command-line arguments to append to the startup command. Example: +sv_lan 1 +sv_password mypassword
